╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ║ ║ 🚀 BOOKS API STARTED SUCCESSFULLY! ║ ║ ║ ╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣ ║ ║ ║ 📍 Base URL: http://localhost:8080 ║ ║ 🔧 Profile: default ║ 📊 Status: RUNNING ║ ║ ║ ║ 📚 Available Endpoints: ║ ║ ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║ ║ POST /authors/{authorId}/books - Create book ║ ║ GET /authors/{authorId}/books - List books ║ ║ GET /authors/{authorId}/books/{id} - Get book ║ ║ PUT /authors/{authorId}/books/{id} - Update book ║ ║ DELETE /authors/{authorId}/books/{id} - Delete book ║ ║ Get api/books -get all books ║ ╚═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
